AnalysisUpdate.summary: Pattern viability and scoring data update for a single player

AdminForfeitOverride.summary: Admin forced a player to forfeit for audit transparency

AdminPauseOverride.summary: Admin paused the game overriding normal host controls

AdminResumeOverride.summary: Admin resumed a previously paused game

BlankExchanged.summary: Player exchanged a blank tile without revealing specifics

CallResolved.summary: Call window resolved after buffered intents or timeout

CallWindowClosed.summary: Call window closed without a call being made

CallWindowOpened.summary: Call window opened for a discard with eligible seats listed

CharlestonComplete.summary: Charleston sequence finished; main play begins

CharlestonPhaseChanged.summary: Charleston stage advanced to a new pass direction

CharlestonTimerStarted.summary: Timer started for the current Charleston pass stage

CommandRejected.summary: Command rejected with a reason for the requesting player

CourtesyPairReady.summary: Courtesy pass pair agreed on a tile count and is ready to exchange

CourtesyPassComplete.summary: Courtesy pass flow completed for the table

CourtesyPassMismatch.summary: Courtesy pass pair proposed different counts; smallest wins

CourtesyPassProposed.summary: Courtesy pass tile count proposed by a player

DiceRolled.summary: East rolled dice to determine wall break position

GameAbandoned.summary: Game abandoned before completion with reason and initiator

GameCreated.summary: Game created and waiting for players to join

GameOver.summary: Game ended with a final result and optional winner

GamePaused.summary: Game paused by a seat with an optional reason

GameStarting.summary: All players are seated; game is starting

HandAnalysisUpdated.summary: Updated distance-to-win and viability counts for a hand

HandValidated.summary: Hand validation result shared with the table

HistoryError.summary: History request failed with an error message

HistoryList.summary: Full move history list sent to a client

HistoryTruncated.summary: History beyond a move number was truncated

HintUpdate.summary: Hint data provided to a player based on current state

JokerExchanged.summary: Player exchanged a joker from an exposed meld

PhaseChanged.summary: Game phase changed (e.g., Charleston to Playing)

PlayerForfeited.summary: Player forfeited and the table was notified

PlayerJoined.summary: Player joined the table with their seat assignment

PlayerReadyForPass.summary: Player submitted tiles and is ready for the current pass

PlayerVoted.summary: Player cast a vote during Charleston continue/stop decision

ReplacementDrawn.summary: Player drew a replacement tile for a Kong, Quint, or blank exchange

StateRestored.summary: Game state restored to a specific move from history

TileCalled.summary: Player called a discard and exposed a meld

TileDiscarded.summary: Player discarded a tile to the table

TileDrawnPrivate.summary: Tile drawn with the tile value shown only to the drawer

TileDrawnPublic.summary: Tile drawn with only the remaining tile count revealed

TilesDealt.summary: Initial tile set dealt privately to a player

TilesPassed.summary: Tiles a player passed during Charleston or courtesy exchange

TilesPassing.summary: Tiles are actively being passed in a given direction

TilesReceived.summary: Tiles received by a player from a pass with the sender noted

TurnChanged.summary: Turn advanced to a player and specific stage

VoteResult.summary: Result of the Charleston continue/stop vote

WallBroken.summary: Wall broken at the determined position

WallExhausted.summary: Wall exhausted with remaining tile count reported
